results.title: Speedtest by Ookla - The Global Broadband Speed Test
results.snippet: Test your internet speed on any device with Speedtest by Ookla, available for free on desktop and mobile apps.

results.title: Speedtest por Ookla - La prueba de velocidad de banda ancha global
results.snippet: Mide la velocidad de tu conexión a Internet con Speedtest, disponible para dispositivos móviles y de escritorio.

results.title: Speedtest by Ookla - Teste de Velocidade de Conexão da Internet
results.snippet: Teste sua velocidade de conexão com o Speedtest, uma ferramenta confiável e fácil de usar para medir a performance da sua internet.

results.title: Speedtest d’Ookla – le test de vitesse de connexion global
results.snippet: Testez la vitesse de votre connexion Internet avec Speedtest d'Ookla, disponible sur tous vos appareils grâce à des applications gratuites.

results.title: Speedtest door Ookla - De wereldwijde breedbandsnelheidstest
results.snippet: Gebruik Speedtest op al uw apparaten met onze gratis desktop- en mobiele apps.

results.title: Speedtest von Ookla - Der umfassende Breitband-Geschwindigkeitstest
results.snippet: Testen Sie Ihre Internetgeschwindigkeit mit dem umfassenden Speedtest von Ookla für Desktop und Mobilgeräte.

results.title: Speedtest di Ookla - Il test globale per la velocità della tua banda larga
results.snippet: Test your internet speed with Speedtest by Ookla, a free and reliable tool for desktop and mobile devices.

results.title: Settings - Speedtest by Ookla
results.snippet: Join the millions of other people helping us to accelerate the Internet! By creating an account, you'll be able to access your historical results anywhere and manage your Speedtest preferences.
